title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
